home.heroBenefit2: Featured companies and clear job posts

home.candidateDescription: Find relevant jobs by career, city, and company in just a few steps.
home.employerDescription: Post jobs, search resumes, and shorten the hiring cycle with tools built for businesses.

home.title: Fast job search, effective recruitment
home.description: Square - Vietnam's leading recruitment platform. Search thousands of matching jobs, apply quickly, and connect with trusted employers.
home.keywords: job search, recruitment, jobs, apply, employers, Square
home.appDescription: A leading online recruitment platform in Vietnam

jobsByCareer.description: Explore jobs by industry at Square. Choose the industry you love and find a suitable job today.
jobsByCareer.keywords: jobs by industry, IT jobs, accounting jobs, marketing jobs, recruitment

jobsByJobType.description: Search jobs by type: full-time, part-time, internship, contract. Many quality job opportunities at Square.
jobsByJobType.keywords: full-time jobs, part-time jobs, internship, contract, remote

jobsByCity.description: Search jobs by city and province across the country at Square. Jobs in Hanoi, Ho Chi Minh City, and other provinces.
jobsByCity.keywords: jobs in Hanoi, jobs in Ho Chi Minh City, jobs by city, local recruitment

jobList.description: Search thousands of the latest jobs at Square. Filter by industry, salary, and location. Apply quickly and easily.
jobList.keywords: job search, latest jobs, recruitment, online application, good jobs

companySearch.description: Discover hundreds of leading employers at Square. Learn about company culture, see open roles, and apply now.
companySearch.keywords: recruiting companies, reputable employers, hiring businesses, company profiles

newsList.title: News & Recruitment Blog
newsList.description: Stay up to date with recruitment trends, application tips, and company insights on Square.
newsList.keywords: recruitment news, recruitment blog, job search tips, hiring trends

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Reach the Square recruitment support team.

sections.title: Support email
sections.body: For account, job post, verification, or interview issues, contact support@square.vn.

sections.title: Business hours
sections.body: Support is available Monday to Friday during business hours.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions from candidates and employers.

sections.title: How do candidates apply?
sections.body: Candidates can create a profile, upload a CV, and apply directly from a job detail page.

sections.title: How do employers verify a company?
sections.body: Employers submit legal profile information and request a verification appointment from the employer portal.

sections.title: How are reports handled?
sections.body: Trust reports are reviewed by admins and moved through open, reviewing, resolved, or rejected statuses.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Baseline terms for using Square recruitment services.

sections.title: Account responsibility
sections.body: Users are responsible for keeping account information accurate and protecting login credentials.

sections.title: Recruitment content
sections.body: Job posts, company profiles, resumes, and interview content must be accurate, lawful, and respectful.

sections.title: Platform operations
sections.body: Square may moderate content, suspend abusive activity, and adjust service availability to protect users.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.body: Square stores account data, profile data, company data, applications, saved profiles, and interview records needed to operate recruitment workflows.

sections.title: Data use
sections.body: Data is used to provide job search, recruiting, matching, interview, notification, and support features.

sections.title: Data control
sections.body: Users can update account and profile information from their dashboard and contact support for privacy requests.
